geopolitics_summary: Iran-US deal reopens Hormuz strait; EU-US trade accord clears Parliament. ETS faces industry pressure; fuel prices elevated.

themes.headline: Iran-US agreement reopens Strait of Hormuz; reduces oil supply disruption risk
themes.why_it_matters: Hormuz closure had spiked crude and LNG arbitrage into Europe. Reopening reduces emergency LNG diversion and cools crude cost base—eases fuel-switching economics for power plants. TTF correlation to Brent tightens.

themes.headline: Steel and chemicals demand freeze to EU Emissions Trading System policy
themes.why_it_matters: ETS is cornerstone of EU power market risk. Industry pressure to freeze carbon pricing could reshape 2026+ baseline assumptions; signals weakening political support for carbon cost pass-through. EUA volatility risk.

themes.headline: EU Parliament passes transatlantic trade deal after months of delay
themes.why_it_matters: Trade accord clarity reduces geopolitical tail risk on US LNG, coal, and power imports to EU. Removes uncertainty premium from forward curve; eases macro backdrop for power valuations in 2026–27.

themes.headline: US jet fuel production surges to record highs post-Hormuz closure
themes.why_it_matters: Elevated crude prices and US refinery utilization feed back into global crude cost and European power plant fuel mix economics. Reflects tight upstream supply; supports longer-term thermal dispatch expectations if crude stays elevated.

themes.headline: Largest US wind farm (3,650 MW) begins commercial operations in June
themes.why_it_matters: US supply growth shifts global LNG export economics and LNG arbitrage into Europe. Marginal impact on EU power, but signals tightening of US gas for export; indirect TTF support via LNG scarcity premium.

watchlist: G7 summit (Evian) outcomes on energy/critical minerals policy & Iran escalation risk
ETS carbon price reaction to industry freeze demand; political momentum test
Hormuz strait stability post-deal; LNG charter rates and arb spreads (TTF vs. JKM)
US transatlantic trade deal implementation detail on LNG, coal tariffs (1–4 weeks)
